title: FitBlocks～Wooden block puzzle～
description:
FitBlocks is a relaxing wooden block puzzle game about fitting every piece perfectly into the tray.

Drag wooden pieces onto the board, rotate them, and find a way to fill the entire shape. There are no timers, scores, or penalties. Take your time, think through each arrangement, and enjoy the quiet satisfaction of making every piece fall into place.

Each stage is handcrafted around a pixel-art inspired silhouette, from simple shapes to more challenging layouts. Early stages are easy to understand, while later puzzles introduce more pieces, unusual shapes, and trickier spaces to solve.

Features:

- Handcrafted block-fitting puzzles

- Relaxing wooden puzzle theme

- Simple mouse controls

- Rotate and place pieces at your own pace

- No timers, scores, or pressure

- Stage select and progressive unlocks

- Challenge stages for players who want harder puzzles

- Calm background music and cozy sound effects

- No hints have been implemented. Please enjoy the game to your heart's content.
description_short: FitBlocks is a relaxing wooden block puzzle game. Drag, rotate, and place every piece into the tray to complete handcrafted pixel-art shaped stages. Enjoy simple controls, cozy music, and increasingly thoughtful puzzles at your own pace.
